reach_why: Extends known critiques of LLM evaluation, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links simulacra, recursive evaluation drift, hard-to-vary criteria, and opaque axioms into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing recursive pipelines against human judgments on genuine insight versus stylistic reconstruction tasks.
explanation: Recursive LLM self-evaluation cannot reliably certify genuine conceptual insight without external human interpretive judgment.
